protein_name: Protease. May regulate the surface expression of some potassium channels by retaining them in the endoplasmic reticulum. Belongs to the peptidase M10A family. Predominantly expressed in ovary, testis and prostate. 3 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
